zh.Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安多福利
zh.Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Wales: 威爾士梅利奧爾利安德維
zh.Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor於1255年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾利安德維時，他的父親Hywel ap Gruffudd25歲，母親Tangwystl Verch Daffyd28歲。他於1284年與Nest verch Gwrwared在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安多福利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在匈牙利享年88歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾。

zh-hans.Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾利安多福利
zh-hans.Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Wales: 威尔士梅利奧爾利安德維
zh-hans.Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor于1255年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾利安德維时，他的父亲Hywel ap Gruffudd25岁，母亲Tangwystl Verch Daffyd28岁。他于1284年与Nest verch Gwrwared在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安多福利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年在匈牙利享年88岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor was born in 1255, in Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Hywel ap Gruffudd, was 25 and his mother, Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, was 28. He married Nest verch Gwrwared in 1284, in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1343, in Hungary, at the age of 88, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor est né en 1255, à Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Hywel ap Gruffudd, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Nest verch Gwrwared en 1284, à Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1343, à Hongrie, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor 1255 in Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel ap Gruffudd 25 und seine Mutter Tangwystl Verch Daffyd 28. Er hat 1284 in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales Nest verch Gwrwared geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Ungarn und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor è nato il nel 1255 nel Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel ap Gruffudd, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Nest verch Gwrwared nel 1284, nel Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel Ungheria, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランドベリー
ja.Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Wales: ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランッドウイウ
ja.Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランサドウルン
ja.Gaerwen, Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイガアーウン
ja.Carmarthenshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイア
ja.Denbighshire, Wales: ウェールズデンビグhシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudorが1255年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランッドウイウで生まれた時，父Hywel ap Gruffuddは25歳，母Tangwystl Verch Daffydは28歳であった。1284年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランドベリーでNest verch Gwrwaredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年にハンガリーで88歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor(이)가 1255년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 랜드w이베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel ap Gruffudd(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Tangwystl Verch Daffyd(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1284년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜도버리에서 Nest verch Gwrwared(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 헝가리에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor nasceu em 1255, em Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel ap Gruffudd, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest verch Gwrwared em 1284, em Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1343, em Hungria, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor родился в 1255 г. в местности лланддвив, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel ap Gruffudd было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest verch Gwrwared в 1284 г. в местности лландовири, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1343 г. в местности Венгрия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor nació en 1255, en Llanddwywe, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel ap Gruffudd, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Tangwystl Verch Daffyd, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Nest verch Gwrwared en 1284, en Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1343, en Hungría, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales.
